{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320170348F333751ED3BA0B78A2A6"}"},"total":227},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7252399288264786699","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看很有趣的一本书，本书文笔不错，剧情不错，角色塑造很好，有笑点，有反差，有甜甜的恋爱，也有真实的人生。
女主:可爱，俏皮，勇敢，热心，护夫，女主既能帮助他人，维护他人，也能怼人，呛人，是一位敢爱敢恨，敢作敢当，爱憎分明的小姑娘，互换身体期间的社死行为真的很有趣很有笑点。
男主:帅气，护妻，小幼稚，喜欢可爱的玩偶和胖丁，讨厌香菜跟酒，晕血，男主以前的故事让我心疼，幸好遇见了女主，男女主彼此之间互相救赎，真的好甜，好有爱。
佩服作者的文笔跟剧情把控，短短一百多章所描述的世界就已经很充实了。
感谢作者描述出了这么一个有趣的世界跟优秀的男女主。
草莓胖丁新婚快乐！(完结撒花)","text_exts":[{"e":44,"s":39,"text":"甜甜的恋爱","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%94%9C%E7%94%9C%E7%9A%84%E6%81%8B%E7%88%B1&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317739974290B78A2A6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227252399288264786699%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227222179231982160956%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%94%9C%E7%94%9C%E7%9A%84%E6%81%8B%E7%88%B1%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":120,"s":116,"text":"互换身体","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%92%E6%8D%A2%E8%BA%AB%E4%BD%93&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317739974290B78A2A6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227252399288264786699%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227222179231982160956%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%92%E6%8D%A2%E8%BA%AB%E4%BD%93%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1688581470,"group_id":"7222179231982160956","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"咸鱼一枚，不要指望我。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6plANSdfhpL5QR1MRMug3Q=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/319741870e854cd09a6ee72d52d08cda~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528719&x-signature=AnBCH8DnxAiZasgiMXnAAsqThXo%3D","user_id":"83624088167","user_name":"雪星梦缘"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"83624088167","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1660847880,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7222179231982160956","book_info":{"abstract":"【身体互换+甜宠+1V1双洁+反差萌】
注：男女主是日久生情，从头到尾没有误会，三观很正，人均有嘴，相互救赎！
乔莓不小心在公司宴会上，连累总裁跟自己一起摔了个狗吃屎，当众社死。
她一觉醒来，发现自己居然和总裁大人灵魂互换了？！
此时不躺平，更待何时？
然而她很快发现，总裁也不是那么好当的。
上班时签亿万合同，她：“卧槽，手滑了，签成自己的名字了！”
下班后替总裁相亲，她：“呵，丫头，你是不是已经被我迷倒了？”
回到豪宅别墅，她：“放心吧总裁大人，我一定不会告诉别人你喜欢毛绒玩具和粉色宝可梦精灵的秘密的！”
她每天都胆战心惊，唯恐自己掉马，怎么活得比狗还累？
乔莓申请摆烂罢演。
总裁大人一声冷笑：
“跟我比摆烂？我明天就用你的身体去公司裸奔一圈，看谁死得更惨。”
于是，在同归于尽和同舟共济的道路上，乔莓果断选择了后者。
而总裁大人揽着她的腰，眸光温柔：
“乔小姐，我选与你同床共枕。民政局九块九，我报销，你来不来？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ob8fc2d61a5baab92469a7569d7bcfb3e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"生橙初五","author_id":"","book_id":"7222179231982160956","book_name":"变身霸总后，我每天都在社死！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#681010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7222183098342408739","read_count":"139","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"225432"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"114","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,总裁,甜宠,豪门世家,双洁","thumb_url":"https://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/dae7ea99948c726d419817b56ec8b154~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181429&x-signature=R4s9X2NyA1zlD56MCJf3AoJOd%2B8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1451830685996920","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.6053471e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320170348F333751ED3BA0B78A2A6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16053,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1584},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1688620143,"author_reply_time":1688620208,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7409174691489579801","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"后面有一个情节特别搞笑，女主突然霸总瘾对男主说霸总语录，然后男主来一句别发神经，这个情侣之间的互动超可爱很日常特别搞笑"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1725086012,"group_id":"7222179231982160956","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"594163563770733"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7222179231982160956","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"244"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":16594,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":31985,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7409165007770632985","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的写得超级好，男女主的情感的递进写得非常流畅，男女主的互动也非常可爱，（两个都是小可爱哟）看书的时候真的被男女主之间毫无保留的非常真诚的爱感动到了！！！另外副cp也很好磕不过篇幅较少，男主真的是非常体贴照顾女主，女主真的是个小太阳一步一步将男主从童年阴影中拉出来。啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊为什么那么好的书没什么流量啊！（本人不太会表达，但真的诚心推荐这本书）很久没有看到这样温馨日常治愈的小甜文了[送心][送心][送心][送心][送心][爱慕]","text_exts":[{"e":194,"s":191,"text":"小甜文","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B0%8F%E7%94%9C%E6%96%87&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317739974290B78A2A6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227409165007770632985%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227222179231982160956%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22 男女主可以说是日久生情，互相治愈，是彼此的小太阳。超级好看，我甚至不知道该怎么夸了。男女主三观这么正，超级可爱！剧情不拖沓，书中人物都张嘴了。
唯一令我遗憾就是宋可米和苏子锌没有感情线吗？小说家✖️医生 也超级好嗑呀
总的来说，为什么不火? 为什么评分没过九?","text_exts":[{"e":34,"s":30,"text":"日久生情","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%97%A5%E4%B9%85%E7%94%9F%E6%83%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317739974290B78A2A6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227261891406887748409%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227222179231982160956%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%97%A5%E4%B9%85%E7%94%9F%E6%83%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690790931,"group_id":"7222179231982160956","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢BG","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7E53Qnt9mfkJWvBLbObHvE=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c65509708b5d40d1997c9d71a2b94ff2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531007&x-signature=qW7Yk1iEJeR34TzidZB8VeD05iw%3D","user_id":"103538659861","user_name":"真的只是路人乙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"103538659861","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7222179231982160956","book_info":{"abstract":"【身体互换+甜宠+1V1双洁+反差萌】
注：男女主是日久生情，从头到尾没有误会，三观很正，人均有嘴，相互救赎！
乔莓不小心在公司宴会上，连累总裁跟自己一起摔了个狗吃屎，当众社死。
她一觉醒来，发现自己居然和总裁大人灵魂互换了？！
此时不躺平，更待何时？
然而她很快发现，总裁也不是那么好当的。
上班时签亿万合同，她：“卧槽，手滑了，签成自己的名字了！”
下班后替总裁相亲，她：“呵，丫头，你是不是已经被我迷倒了？”
回到豪宅别墅，她：“放心吧总裁大人，我一定不会告诉别人你喜欢毛绒玩具和粉色宝可梦精灵的秘密的！”
她每天都胆战心惊，唯恐自己掉马，怎么活得比狗还累？
乔莓申请摆烂罢演。
总裁大人一声冷笑：
“跟我比摆烂？我明天就用你的身体去公司裸奔一圈，看谁死得更惨。”
于是，在同归于尽和同舟共济的道路上，乔莓果断选择了后者。
而总裁大人揽着她的腰，眸光温柔：
